headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Norwegian Cruise Line, Raises Price Target to $25
summary: Citigroup  analyst James Hardiman   maintains Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE:NCLH) with a Buy and raises the price target from $21 to $25.

headline: Have Fuel, Will Travel: Airline,  Cruise Stocks Gain Momentum with Iran Deal
summary: Earlier this month, the International Air Transport Association warned that global airline profits could dip by half this year.
